steps.title: Find b from the graph
steps.content:
For $y=a^x+b$, the horizontal asymptote is $y=b$. From the graph, the asymptote is
$$y=-4$$
So $b=-4$.

steps.title: Find a from another point
steps.content:
The graph also shows the point $(1,1)$. Substitute $x=1$, $y=1$, and $b=-4$.
$$1=a^1-4$$
So $a=5$.
